name: scribe-marketplace
description: Scribe - Google Workspace automation for Claude Code. Push markdown to Drive, read and update Doc tabs, multi-account OAuth. Wraps a fork of taylorwilsdon/google_workspace_mcp with a high-fidelity markdown-to-Google-Docs writer.

plugins.name: scribe
plugins.description: Google Workspace automation skills for Claude Code. Bundles a markdown-to-Google-Docs writer (via the workspace-mcp fork) with skills for OAuth setup, multi-account switching, and direct push of markdown into Drive folders or specific Doc tabs.
